name: The Citizens Bank Of Winfield
description_short: The Citizens Bank of Winfield is a community bank offering checking, savings, lending, and mobile banking services with local decision-making and experienced loan officers.
description_long: The Citizens Bank of Winfield is a locally-operated bank serving the Winfield community with a focus on personalized service and local lending decisions. The institution operates with an emphasis on hometown banking values, staffed by experienced loan officers who understand regional financial needs. According to their website, they hold NMLS # 440405 and maintain an active online presence at cbwinfield.com. The bank offers a range of standard banking services including personal lending, deposit accounts, and mobile banking capabilities. They provide mobile deposit functionality through their CBW Mobile app, allowing customers to deposit checks remotely by photographing front and back images. The bank also offers instant issue debit cards, enabling customers to access funds immediately upon account opening or card replacement without waiting for mail delivery. They facilitate loan payments and deposits through their website and mobile platform. The Citizens Bank of Winfield distinguishes itself through its local lending team and community-focused approach. Their leadership includes a President (Chris Carothers) and Senior Vice President (Chele Miles) with multiple loan officers at various levels (Vice President, Assistant Vice President, Assistant Cashier, and Senior Lending Officer). The bank emphasizes that local loan officers make lending decisions, contrasting with larger institutional lenders that often use centralized underwriting. As a community bank, The Citizens Bank of Winfield operates with standard banking security protocols and fraud protections. The website includes a fraud alert warning about phone number spoofing scams. However, the publicly available information is limited to general banking services; specific product details, fee structures, interest rates, and lending terms are not disclosed on the website itself. Prospective customers would need to visit in person or contact the bank directly for detailed product information.
services: Mobile banking through CBW Mobile app
Mobile deposit with remote check imaging
Secured email communication for sensitive account matters
pros: Local loan officers with years of combined experience make lending decisions
Instant issue debit cards available immediately for new accounts and replacements
Mobile deposit functionality through CBW Mobile app for remote check deposits
Multiple convenient ways to access banking services (in-person, online, mobile, phone)
Active fraud monitoring and security alerts to protect customer accounts
Community-focused lending approach emphasizing local decision-making
Dedicated lending team with clear management structure and titles
cons: Limited product information available on website; customers must contact bank directly for rates and terms
Appears to be a small regional bank with potentially limited service areas outside Winfield
No information provided about fees, minimum balances, or account requirements on public website
Mobile deposit requires properly endorsed checks and manual image submission process
No mention of investment products, wealth management, or business banking services
best_for: Individuals seeking personal loans from local lenders with community knowledge
Customers preferring face-to-face banking relationships over large national banks
Small business owners in the Winfield area needing local financing decisions
Those who value instant issue debit cards and mobile deposit convenience
diagnosis: The Citizens Bank of Winfield is best for community-focused borrowers and depositors in the Winfield area who value local lending decisions and personalized service. The main caveat is that detailed product information, rates, fees, and eligibility requirements are not available on their public website, requiring direct contact with the bank for specifics.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: The Citizens Bank of Winfield offers checking, savings, lending, and mobile banking services with local decision-making and experienced loan officers.
